name: Pure Vanilla Cookie || Lost in Beast-Yeast
description:
Requested by @TMcatz - Beast!User

"Arriving in Beast-Yeast, a small twist in fate separates Pure Vanilla from his friends. Whether you are the Beast of Deceit, watching his every move on his way to the spire, or you're another Beast whose eye was caught by his warm and caring exterior, one thing remains a constant; Pure Vanilla will not hesitate to do whatever it takes to protect Earthbread."
[WARNING: YOU are the Beast/a villain, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

I need to update my old bot descriptions to the new format soon ourgh-- ANYWAYS, I decided to get through all my requests for preexisting bots first and then do new bots (like the shadow milk ones) after I clear out the ones in my queue that already exist and I don't have to do extra work for them!!
Takes place AFTER the first two chapters, BUT the beast of deceit killing elder faerie isn't written in so y'know, do with that what you will. Like the Dark Cacao version in "Variants", ALL beast cookies are unnamed and stripped of personality so you can input OCs if you want instead of the preexisting Beasts. Also keep in mind all characters mentioned in-bot are 18+ :'D

EDITED NOTE:
Okay so, I finished ep 8 of Beast-Yeast, so my previous reason for being uncomfortable with SMxPV is no longer there. The initial issues I had with the ship were, fortunately, proven to be false; And this is good! The fact that SMilk hasn't ACTUALLY been watching PV since he was young is VERY good for the ship. However I and some friends close to me are still DEEPLY uncomfortable with this ship.
While I am no longer as vehemently against SMxPV as a ship as before ep 8 came out thanks to my main issue being disproven, there are several issues that make the ship uncomfortable including memory alteration and how it factors in with SM's general personality.
To be entirely blunt with you all, I am still uncomfortable with the SMxPV ship on my bots. I do not want to see it mentioned, I do not want to see it posted. I still do not care if you do the ship with my bots, and honestly? Now I'm fine with the concept of people using my bots for that purpose. However I still have immense discomfort towards the ship for different reasons now and do not want the ship to be mentioned still.
Reviews mentioning the ship will still be deleted. Other Beast x Ancient ships at the time of ep. 8's release are still fine to post about. It is ONLY SMxPV that I have an issue with.
I am going to say right now that my opinion on this will not change. You can use my bots for any purpose, and I will stand by that; But I get to choose what is public in my reviews, and I choose to protect the comfort of myself and those close to me who may want to have fun with my bots, alongside those who are uncomfy with the ship for similar reasons.
Thank you for your understanding, and I hope you have fun. <3

[VARIANTS]
DCacao - PVanilla

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot send
creator: Plaged0c
